name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior

labels: bug

---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Enter '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, screenshots, or console output if relevant.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS, Windows, Linux]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.x]
- Input that caused the issue: [e.g. address, ENS, domain]

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
